mapper.select: SELECT d.name AS dogName, cr.title AS title, md.medication_start_date AS startDate, (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval)::date AS endDate, -- 오늘 기준 남은 일수 (과거 기록일 경우 0 이하가 될 수 있음) GREATEST(0, (EXTRACT(DAY FROM (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval) - #{today}::timestamp))::int) AS remainingDays FROM public.care_record_medical_details md JOIN public.care_records cr ON md.care_record_id = cr.id JOIN public.dogs d ON cr.dog_id = d.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} -- 필터 기간 내의 기록이면서 AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- 오늘 날짜가 복약 기간에 포함되어야 함 AND md.medication_start_date <= #{today} AND (md.medication_start_date + (md.medication_days || ' days')::interval) >= #{today} AND md.is_medication_completed = false ORDER BY endDate ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT sm.name AS name, COUNT(crs.symptom_id) AS count FROM public.care_record_symptoms crs JOIN public.symptoms_master sm ON crs.symptom_id = sm.id JOIN public.care_records cr ON crs.care_record_id = cr.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY sm.name ORDER BY count DESC, sm.name ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.schedule_date AS scheduleDate, s.location, (EXTRACT(DAY FROM s.schedule_date - #{today}::timestamp))::bigint AS dDay FROM public.schedules s JOIN public.dogs d ON s.dog_id = d.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND s.dog_id = #{dogId} AND s.schedule_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND s.schedule_date >= #{today} ORDER BY s.schedule_date ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT cr.id, c.code_name AS type, cr.record_date AS date, cr.title, COALESCE(md.amount, ed.amount, 0) AS amount FROM public.care_records cr LEFT JOIN public.care_record_medical_details md ON cr.id = md.care_record_id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_expense_details ed ON cr.id = ed.care_record_id LEFT JOIN public.codes c ON cr.record_type_id = c.id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY cr.record_date DESC, cr.created_at DESC

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', #{startDate}::date) AS month_date UNION ALL SELECT month_date + INTERVAL '1 month' FROM month_series WHERE month_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', #{endDate}::date) ) SELECT TO_CHAR(ms.month_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(combined.total), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(combined.medical), 0) AS medicalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(combined.expense), 0) AS otherAmount FROM month_series ms LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cr.record_date) AS record_month, (COALESCE(md.amount, 0) + COALESCE(ed.amount, 0)) AS total, COALESCE(md.amount, 0) AS medical, COALESCE(ed.amount, 0) AS expense FROM public.care_records cr LEFT JOIN public.care_record_medical_details md ON cr.id = md.care_record_id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_expense_details ed ON cr.id = ed.care_record_id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cr.dog_id = #{dogId} AND cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ) combined ON ms.month_date = combined.record_month GROUP BY ms.month_date ORDER BY ms.month_date ASC
